HGSS.248.0000:
Welcome to Fast Ship S.S. Aqua.\f
...Except that the engine-maintenance
team is taking some time off, and we\r
don’t know when we can depart...
HGSS.248.0001:
Welcome to Fast Ship S.S. Aqua.
May I see your S.S. Ticket?\f
HGSS.248.0002:
[0103,0000,0000] tried to show the
S.S. Ticket...\f
...But no Ticket here!\f
HGSS.248.0003:
I’m sorry...\f
Another person without a Ticket
wouldn’t make much of a difference,\r
I think.\f
But a rule is a rule.
Sorry, kiddo.
HGSS.248.0005:
OK, you have a Ticket!\f
We’re departing soon.
Get on board quick!\f
HGSS.248.0006:
What?
You already showed me the Ticket.
HGSS.248.0007:
Welcome to the S.S. Aqua!\f
Your Ticket is...right there.
Please come through.\f
HGSS.248.0008:
Operating a ship every day can wear
you out!\r
It’s not running today.\f
It leaves for Vermilion City on Mondays
and Fridays!
HGSS.248.0009:
Professor Oak: Hello!
You are starting to have the\r
attitude of a Champion, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
It’s time for your Pokédex to match
who you are.\r
Let me see your Pokédex for a second.\f
I’ll upgrade your Pokédex with
the National Mode.\f
HGSS.248.0010:
Professor Oak: Hello!
You are starting to have the...\r
attitude of a Champion, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
It’s time for your Pokédex to match
who you are.\r
Let me see your Pokédex for a second.\f
I’ll upgrade your Pokédex with
the National Mode.\f
HGSS.248.0011:
[0103,0000,0000]’s Pokédex was upgraded
with the National Mode!
HGSS.248.0012:
Professor Oak: It won’t be easy to
complete the National Pokédex...\f
However, I’m sure you will make an
honest attempt on our behalf!\f
HGSS.248.0013:
Oh, time flies!\f
I have a radio show to record
at Goldenrod Radio Tower.\f
You must be heading for Kanto.\f
If you come near Pallet Town, do drop
by my Pokémon Research Lab!\f
HGSS.248.0014:
The S.S. Aqua uses jets to travel.
It skims over water!
HGSS.248.0015:
You’ve been to Kanto already?\f
I hear many rare Pokémon live
over there.\f
Sounds exciting.
I’d love to visit!
